name: 残酷的达里尔爵士（迈阿密）| 专业人士
nameEn: Sir Bloody Miami Darryl | The Professionals
nameZh: 残酷的达里尔爵士（迈阿密）| 专业人士
descriptionEn: The leader of 'The Professionals' can be described as cocky, wisecracking, and scarily indifferent with regards to the suffering of others. He would say he's just a bloke—a bloke that likes to have a bit of fun on the weekend with the local armed tax collectors. He downplays the severity of any heavy situations that come his way, even if he's the last man standing, riddled with bullets, with only seconds left to blow the safe. This white hockey mask and floral shirt were popular choices during his Vice phase. Got my hair combed back and my sunglasses on.
descriptionZh: 这位臭名昭著的打劫团伙“专业人士”的领导者，傲慢、聪明又极其冷漠，特别是在对他人的痛苦方面。他自称自己只是一个喜欢在周末给当地武装税务人员找乐子的家伙。他对面临的任何问题都嗤之以鼻，不管那个问题有多么严重，即使这意味着他在火拼后孤身一人，身体被打成筛子，或炸开保险箱的时间只剩几秒，他也完全不在乎。 这个白色冰球面具和花衬衫是他恶人生涯中最爱的装扮。 梳个大背头，带个太阳镜
